# [T1 thread-create+tool-call] Use the tool-help...

STEP_OK
user: [T5c execute-tool-direct] Call the execute-tool endpoint with toolName='tool-help' and input={}. Check that the inner result contains a tools array with at least one entry. End your reply with STEP_OK if a tools list was returned, or FAILED: <reason> if the result was missing or malformed.

STEP_OK </think> STEP_OK
user: [T6a wakeUp-phase1] Call the generate_image tool with prompt='wakeup-test' and callbackMode='wakeUp'. The image will be generated asynchronously. IMPORTANT: In this first phase you should receive a taskId with no imageUrl yet - end your reply with STEP_OK if you see taskId and no imageUrl, or FAILED: <reason> otherwise. ALSO IMPORTANT: You will be automatically revived when the image is ready. When revived (you will see the generate_image tool result containing an imageUrl), confirm the imageUrl

I should report WAKEUP_FAILED with the reason being the failed status. </think> WAKEUP_FAILED: Tool returned status "failed" with suc
